channel.title: Build-Tool on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Build-Tool on Arrans github.io

item.title: go-task/task
item.description: A task runner / simpler Make alternative written in Go

item.title: mitchellh/gon
item.description: Sign, notarize, and package macOS CLI tools and applications written in any language. Available as both a CLI and a Go library.
